title: CENTER FOR WOMEN'S HEALTH SERVICES - 211info
text: CENTER FOR WOMEN’S HEALTH CENTER FOR WOMEN'S HEALTH SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides obstetric and gynecological services. Services include breast exams and mammograms, prenatal, childbirth, and postpartum care, lactation support, annual gynecological exams, STI/STD testing and treatment, contraceptives, tubal ligation services, and abortion services. For male sterilization (vasectomy), contact the Urology Clinic at 503-346-1500. 808 SW Campus Drive 7th Floor Portland, OR 97239 Eligibility: Women of any age Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (503) 418-4500 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 418-4500 Reception Reception (503) 418-4500 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information and to schedule an appointment FEES: Accepts OHP (Medicaid), Medicare, and most private insurance. Also offers financial assistance to those who qualify who are uninsured. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable, or for those applying for financial assistance AREA SERVED: State of Oregon SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: OHSU Center for Women's Health, located on the 7th floor of the Peter O. Kohler Pavilion on the OHSU Marquam Hill Campus. Services: Abortions Birth Control Counseling Breast Examinations Breast Self Examination Instruction Breastfeeding Support Programs Contraception Obstetrics/Gynecology Pap Tests Prenatal Care Pro-Choice Pregnancy Counseling Sterilization * Women Women's Health Centers Other Services Offered At This Location: HUMAN REPRODUCTION - CHILDBIRTH AND PARENTING PREPARATION CLASSES MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - WOMEN'S MENTAL HEALTH SERVICES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. CENTER FOR WOMEN’S HEALTH
